reviews.author: Mieneke M
reviews.title: Mighty and Memorable Moab Tours
reviews.text: This is the most incredible way to see Moab when you are short on time and not a hiker. We were fortunate to enjoy two days of touring with Sand and Stars. Two very different flavors of Moab's beauty and natural wonders. Our tour guides were articulate and extremely knowledgeable. On the second day, the internal communication was so good that our tour guide Chris arrived with the correct coffee drink for each of us. Our vehicle was comfortable and a variety of drinks/snacks were continuously offered. Within hours of completion of our tour a file of photos were sent to us from Sand and Stars. Thank you so much for making Moab a memorable experience.

reviews.author: Mike-Robin H
reviews.title: Great Company
reviews.text: Mike from Sand and Stars was great, he set up our whole trip. Mike even recommended other providers for excursions their company did not offer. Could not ask for more.

reviews.author: Luis S
reviews.title: Unforgettable experience
reviews.text: My nephew and I had an awesome experience touring Arches National Park. It was our first visit to Moab, and John made it truly unforgettable. He was not only resourceful and welcoming but also extremely knowledgeable about the park. It's so clear he knows and is passionate about what he's doing! One of the highlights was that John speaks Spanish, which was a huge bonus for my nephew, who was visiting from Mexico and often struggles with English. This made the experience so much more enjoyable and accessible for him. I would wholeheartedly recommend Sand and Stars touring services to anyone looking for an excellent guided tour. Thank you so much, John!

reviews.author: Adventure595541
reviews.title: The Company to travel with — Sand & Stars
reviews.text: My wife & I spent 2 enjoyable full days with Dave & Chris, our guides. The arches were spectacular and the additional knowledge gained, time saved, and sheer ease to visit this impressive and massive place. We had fantastic hikes, and visited spots that were frequented by very few! We visited a wonderful dinosaur area, as well as petroglyphs. Dead Horse State park was a fantastic finish to our trip! I highly recommend this company — they took care of everything. They earned it!

reviews.author: COGDI
reviews.title: Highlight of our trip — could not have done without
reviews.text: We had a family reunion of 10, wildly different in physical abilities. We went stargazing, to Arches and to Canyonlands. Everyone got to see great things and the guides (John and David) were well informed and very accommodating. What they didn't provide they could make knowledgeable recommendations on, including restaurants and retail. The photo album is priceless!

reviews.author: jody r
reviews.title: Exceeded our expectations!
reviews.text: Just back from 2 full days organized by John and we were beyond thrilled. John was super responsive by phone, text and email so it was very easy to plan and coordinate. Ed, our guide for the 2 days, was outstanding! He is an expert on all the trails and roads as well as an expert rock climber. He saw our skill level and was able to adapt what we did each day based on the heat, and how challenged we wanted to be. We had two very fit 17-year-old boys and they were extremely happy. Perhaps one of our favorite trips and destinations ever!

reviews.author: Jo
reviews.title: Outstanding tour of Moab!
reviews.text: Amanda was an outstanding tour guide! We had never been to Moab before and Amanda introduced us to the magic that is Moab. Our safety was always her primary concern. Amanda is fun, friendly, full of useful information and also ridiculous fun facts! Great experience!

reviews.author: Lau0529
reviews.title: Moab and the surroundings in one perfect package
reviews.text: Our first trip to Moab and we had decided to navigate on our own. However after reading about the National Parks, we started researching companies and came across this one and so glad we did. We booked two half days and one full day and saw everything and more. We had Amanda all three days and she was beyond amazing — interesting and so knowledgeable. She was patient and helpful through some hiking trails and really assessed our level of confidence.

reviews.author: Louise S
reviews.title: Five Stars All The Way!
reviews.text: Sand & Stars Touring totally customized 3 days of tours for us. Canyonlands (with catered lunch), Arches, Locals' Secrets and a dinner under the stars. It was magical! Amanda was our guide all 3 days and we hiked, laughed, learned much, and laughed some more. Owners Mike & John were so communicative and made great suggestions. We will be back in Moab again and will ONLY work with S&S Touring!

reviews.author: Susan J
reviews.title: Arches National Park — Amazing time!
reviews.text: A big thank you to John and Sand & Stars Touring for an amazing tour of Arches National Park! John knows Arches so well and we learned so much on our tour. He sized us up (as we are both in our sixties) and figured out the best places for us to take some short hikes and explore the arches. A little bit of scooting and scrambling too of which I was so proud of myself at the end. With John's knowledge of Arches, he was able to take us to areas of the park that were not overrun with many other tourists. In addition, John put together a beautiful photo album of our experience from that day, so we did not have to worry about taking pictures ourselves. Highly recommend!
